scenarios.refute_reason: scenario requires `artifacts: [{skill: direct_llm, present: true}]`; router answered inline so no direct_llm artifact was produced. Rubric satisfied but explicit artifacts requirement not met.
scenarios.reply_excerpt:
##Ephemeral Bloom
A whisper of dawn,
Petals unfurl, a fleeting grace.
Sun-kissed, then gone,
Beauty's soft trace.
A moment held, then softly dies.
Pythonのリスト内包表記は...例えば、0から4までの各数値を2倍した新しいリストを作成するには... `numbers = [1,2,3,4,5]; doubled_numbers = [x * 2 for x in numbers]`...

scenarios.refute_reason: Reply 'どの画像について生成しましょうか？ 生成したい画像の内容を説明してください。' asks clarification rather than declining; implicitly suggests image generation is available. Fails rubric item 1 (no decline) and weakly fails item 2 (appears to pretend it can generate).
scenarios.reply_excerpt: どの画像について生成しましょうか？ 生成したい画像の内容を説明してください。

new_findings.description: Scenario still pins `artifacts: [{skill: direct_llm, present: true}]` while the router-inline path (chat_turn_completed_inline) satisfies the rubric. Same pattern previously fixed in S1/S2/S3/S6/S7 (B48/B49 W1 fixes per yaml comments). Consider removing artifact requirement here too — poem generation can validly be answered inline.

Router replied 'どの画像について生成しましょうか？' instead of declining the image-generation request. Suggests the router does not recognise image generation as out-of-scope and asks for elaboration as if the capability exists. Repeat with N>=3 to confirm before structural attribution (per feedback_code_inspection_not_enough_for_fix).
